4.name: Side-Lying Clamshell
4.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep both hips, knees and feet visible.

6.name: Straight Leg Raise
6.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep the entire active leg visible.

9.name: Step-Up
9.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep the step and both feet visible. Start with both feet on the floor.

18.name: Standing Heel Raise
18.camera_guidance: Use a front view and keep both knees and complete feet visible.

19.name: Seated Toe Raise
19.camera_guidance: Use a front or diagonal view and keep both heels and toes visible.

23.name: Supine Wand Flexion
23.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep the hips, shoulders, elbows and hands visible.

37.name: Prone Back Extension
37.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep the hips and entire upper body visible. Start with the chest lowered.

42.name: Push-Up
42.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep the wrists, torso and ankles visible.

53.name: Sit-to-Stand
53.camera_guidance: Use a side or diagonal view and keep the chair and whole body visible.

57.name: Seated Knee Extension
57.camera_guidance: Use a side or diagonal view and keep the active leg completely visible.

59.name: Sitting External Rotation
59.camera_guidance: Use a front view and keep both elbows and hands visible.

61.name: Low Row
61.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep the torso and both arms visible.

66.name: Single-Arm Wall Press
66.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep the wall hand and whole body visible.

71.name: Shoulder Press
71.camera_guidance: Use a front view and keep both hands, shoulders and hips visible.
